caption: A young man wearing a pink tank top stands in an indoor basketball gymnasium with blue wall padding and wooden flooring. On-screen text consistently overlays the scene, reading "#292", "10ft Dunks/Height Checks", and "Dunk Journey 2.0". In the beginning, the man looks directly toward the camera with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he maintains his position, though his facial expression shifts slightly. In the final moment, he begins to move, holding a basketball in his right hand and starting a motion with his arm as he looks slightly off-camera. The background remains a static shot of the gymnasium, showing the blue walls and the edge of the court.
